name: Coral Crater Adventure Park
tagline: Ziplines, an aerial adventure course, and ATV rides inside a volcanic crater — an adrenaline rush for older keiki.
hours: Daily 8am–4pm; book activities online in advance
bestTime: Morning for cooler temps; weekdays for shorter waits on courses
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates with Hawaii ID — check website for current local pricing
talkStory: Set inside a real 200-foot-deep volcanic crater formed about 100,000 years ago, this adventure park sits on former military land once used for target practice. The crater's natural bowl shape creates a dramatic amphitheater for the zipline course, which spans over 2,000 feet. The aerial ropes course has 60+ elements across multiple difficulty levels. Insider tip: the freefall jump is the newest addition most visitors skip -- a controlled 40-foot drop that thrills older keiki.
